summary: Re-verified the two Slice 5 frontend bugs from iteration_6 after main agent's fixes. Both BUGS ARE FIXED and the previously blocked delete-account flow now works end-to-end. Playwright ran on http://localhost:3000 at 390x844 mobile viewport. Flow executed: sign-in via phone (+919000012345 / 123456) -> onboarding auto-advance -> Home -> home-dev-menu -> Settings -> Weekly report (report-share-image) -> back to Settings -> premium-card -> Paywall (paywall-purchase, yearly default) -> back to Settings -> settings-delete-account -> sign-in. NO BACKEND RE-TEST performed this round per instructions.

react_native_issues.issue: 'shadow*' style props are still deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'. Reference: frontend/src/theme.ts (open since iteration_2, non-blocking, informational only).
'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.' (open since iteration_4, non-blocking, informational only).

'Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web. Adding a listener will have no effect.' - documented behaviour; already surfaced in the Settings preview banner. No action required.

action_items: None blocking. Optional cleanup (already carried from prior iterations): migrate shadow* -> boxShadow in src/theme.ts and props.pointerEvents -> style.pointerEvents.
critical_code_review_comments: frontend/app/report/weekly.tsx shareImage() now wraps captureRef in try/catch and on web falls back to Clipboard.setStringAsync + toast. Verified: no red-screen overlay, no console errors on tap, report-toast becomes visible with 'Image sharing works on your device. Text copied instead.'

frontend/app/settings.tsx now calls useFocusEffect(load) in addition to useEffect. Verified: after MOCK paywall-purchase and router.back(), premium-card immediately re-renders with 'Premium active' + 'yearly · unlimited pantry & plans'.

settings-delete-account now flows cleanly: confirm accepted -> DELETE /api/account -> logout -> router.replace('/sign-in'). Landed on /sign-in and sign-in-screen (with sign-in-phone-btn / sign-in-google-btn) is visible.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (3/3 re-verified: report-share-image toast, premium-card refresh on focus, delete-account -> sign-in)

seed_data_creation: None. Reused mock phone-OTP user +919000012345 / 123456; the account is deleted at the end of the flow via DELETE /api/account so the next run can re-sign-in fresh.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 confirms iteration_6 defects are resolved. Test recipe used: (1) sign-in-phone-btn -> phone-input '9000012345' -> phone-send-btn -> otp-input '123456' -> otp-name-input 'Test User' -> otp-verify-btn. (2) Loop onboarding-next after diet-veg selection until home-screen. (3) home-dev-menu -> settings-screen -> settings-report -> report-share-image (assert report-toast, assert no 'findNodeHandle is not supported' in body). (4) go_back -> premium-card -> paywall-purchase -> assert premium-card text contains 'Premium active'. (5) settings-delete-account with page.on('dialog', accept) -> assert sign-in-screen visible. Observed initial pantry usage 8/25 and plans 0/4 for this shared test user; that is expected because prior runs populated the account before deletion during earlier iterations - after this run's DELETE, the next sign-in will start fresh.
rca_of_issue: N/A - both bugs verified fixed. BUG1 (report-share-image findNodeHandle) resolved by wrapping captureRef in try/catch with web-specific Clipboard fallback + toast at frontend/app/report/weekly.tsx:71-108. BUG2 (stale premium banner) resolved by adding useFocusEffect(useCallback(() => { load(); }, [load])) at frontend/app/settings.tsx:81-85 so /api/premium/status refetches whenever Settings regains focus (e.g., after router.back() from paywall).
